title: Cymboglossum palawanense
taxonomy: Cymboglossum palawanense is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to the Philippines. The classification of Cymboglossum palawanense is that it belongs to the genus Cymboglossum and is a type of asparagus-like plant. The plant is also known as a type of lilyturf. Cymboglossum palawanense is a unique species within the Cymboglossum genus.
